title: GenomeLens 一站式共线性分析
description: 面向比较基因组学的一站式共线性分析插件。它可在 2~n 个物种之间自动完成同源搜索、共线性区块识别与图形输出，用于观察染色体保守关系、片段重排、复制事件以及目标基因周边微共线性环境；最终可直接得到 block 结果、全局共线性图和局部共线性图。
description_en: A one-stop comparative genomics plugin for synteny analysis across 2 to n species. It automates homology search, synteny block discovery, and figure generation to reveal chromosome conservation, rearrangements, duplication signals, and target-gene local neighborhoods, producing block results together with global and local synteny figures.
context: 适用于双物种或多物种比较、候选基因上下游保守性判读、染色体结构变动观察，以及论文级共线性结果整理的一站式工作流。
context_en: Designed for pairwise or multi-species comparison, candidate-gene neighborhood interpretation, chromosome-scale structural comparison, and publication-ready synteny result generation in one workflow.

params.label: 输入目录
params.description:
放入至少 2 个物种的输入文件目录。每个物种必须按同名前缀成对提供，支持两类组合：
- BED + CDS/PEP
- GFF/GTF + 基因组 FASTA
不同物种之间可以混用不同输入模式，但同一物种内部必须完整配对，例如：
- Athaliana.bed + Athaliana.cds
- Brapa.bed + Brapa.pep
- Crubella.gff3 + Crubella.fa
若同一物种同时存在 BED+CDS/PEP 与 GFF/GTF+FASTA，则优先采用 BED 方案。该目录将决定后续能否正确构建物种配对、共线性区块和出图结果。
params.description_en:
Directory containing input files for at least two species. Each species must be provided as a matched same-stem pair, using one of two supported combinations:
- BED + CDS/PEP
- GFF/GTF + genome FASTA
Different species may use different modes, but files within one species must be complete and paired, for example:
- Athaliana.bed + Athaliana.cds
- Brapa.bed + Brapa.pep
- Crubella.gff3 + Crubella.fa
If both BED+CDS/PEP and GFF/GTF+FASTA exist for the same species, the BED route is preferred. This directory determines whether GenomeLens can correctly build species pairs, identify synteny blocks, and generate the expected figures.

params.label: 输出目录
params.description: 分析结果输出目录。这里通常会生成同源搜索结果、共线性区块文件、汇总图件以及后续可复用的中间文件。
params.description_en: Output directory for analysis results. This is where homology search outputs, synteny block files, summary figures, and reusable intermediate files are usually written.

params.label: 参考物种
params.description: 指定比较中的参考物种名称或 1-based 索引；默认第一个物种。它会影响多物种比较中的主坐标、局部共线性对齐方向以及目标基因所在的解释视角。
params.description_en: Specify the reference species name or 1-based index; the first species is used by default. This affects the main coordinate system in multi-species comparisons, the alignment perspective of local synteny, and how target-gene-centered results are interpreted.

params.label: 目标基因 ID
params.description: 填写后自动切换为目标基因驱动的局部共线性分析，用于观察候选基因上下游保守邻域与跨物种对应关系；多个基因用逗号分隔。
params.description_en: When provided, the workflow switches to target-driven local synteny analysis to inspect conserved neighborhoods and cross-species counterparts around candidate genes; use commas to separate multiple IDs.

params.label: 上游窗口基因数
params.description: 局部共线性模式下，从每个目标基因上游额外纳入多少个基因。数值越大，越适合观察更长范围的邻域保守性与局部重排。
params.description_en: In local synteny mode, controls how many additional genes upstream of each target gene are included. Larger values are useful for inspecting broader neighborhood conservation and local rearrangements.

params.label: 下游窗口基因数
params.description: 局部共线性模式下，从每个目标基因下游额外纳入多少个基因。与上游窗口共同决定局部图的观察范围。
params.description_en: In local synteny mode, controls how many additional genes downstream of each target gene are included. Together with the upstream window, it defines the visible range of the local synteny figure.

params.label: 多个目标各自出图
params.description: 多个目标基因时分别生成独立图件，便于逐个比较每个候选位点的局部保守性。
params.description_en: Generate one figure per target when multiple genes are provided, making it easier to compare the local conservation pattern of each candidate locus.

params.label: 标注目标基因
params.description: 在局部共线性图中直接标出目标基因名称，方便论文作图与位点核对。
params.description_en: Label target gene names directly on local synteny figures for easier manuscript preparation and locus verification.

params.label: 线程数
params.description: 运行时可并行使用的线程数，主要影响同源搜索与部分文件处理阶段的速度。
params.description_en: Number of worker threads available during execution, mainly affecting the speed of homology search and parts of the file-processing pipeline.

params.label: 最小共线性区块大小
params.description: 保留一个共线性区块所需的最小基因数。数值越高，结果通常越保守、越偏向稳定大片段；数值越低，则更容易保留短小但可能有意义的局部区块。
params.description_en: Minimum number of genes required to retain a synteny block. Higher values usually make the result more conservative and biased toward stable large segments, while lower values retain shorter local blocks that may still be biologically meaningful.

params.label: 输出格式
params.description: 最终图件输出格式。`svg`/`pdf` 更适合后续编辑与论文排版，`png`/`jpg` 更适合快速预览与汇报。
params.description_en: Final figure output format. `svg` and `pdf` are better for downstream editing and manuscript layout, while `png` and `jpg` are more convenient for quick preview and presentation.

params.label: 比对后端
params.description: 同源搜索所使用的比对后端。不同工具在速度、灵敏度和适用序列类型上各有侧重，会直接影响后续锚点数量与共线性区块识别结果。
params.description_en: Alignment backend used for homology search. Different tools vary in speed, sensitivity, and suitable sequence types, and they directly influence the number of anchors and the downstream synteny block results.

params.label: 序列类型
params.description: 指定用于同源搜索的序列类型：`nucl` 为核酸，`prot` 为蛋白。它会影响比对策略以及最终同源命中的组成。
params.description_en: Specify the sequence type used in homology search: `nucl` for nucleotide sequences and `prot` for protein sequences. This affects the alignment strategy and the composition of final homologous hits.

params.label: 同源匹配过滤强度
params.description: 同源匹配过滤强度阈值。更高的值通常会保留更可信的匹配、减少噪声，但也可能丢失较弱的远缘同源信号。
params.description_en: Filtering strength threshold for homology matches. Higher values usually retain more confident matches and reduce noise, but may also remove weaker signals from more distant homologs.

params.label: 共线性锚点最大基因距离
params.description: 定义两个锚点在基因顺序上允许相隔的最大距离。较大的值更宽松，适合结构扰动较多的基因组；较小的值更严格，更强调紧密保守的共线性片段。
params.description_en: Maximum allowed distance between anchors in gene order. Larger values are more permissive and suit genomes with heavier structural disturbance, while smaller values are stricter and emphasize tightly conserved syntenic segments.

params.label: Block 过滤迭代次数
params.description: 共线性区块过滤的迭代次数。更多迭代通常会进一步清理不稳定或边缘性区块，但也可能让结果更保守。
params.description_en: Number of synteny block filtering iterations. More iterations usually further clean unstable or marginal blocks, but can also make the final result more conservative.

params.label: 基因形状
params.description: 共线性图中基因的绘制样式。`arrow` 更适合强调方向信息，`box` 更适合简洁展示区段对应关系。
params.description_en: Drawing style for genes in synteny figures. `arrow` is better for emphasizing directionality, whereas `box` is cleaner for simplified segment correspondence.

params.label: 基因着色
params.description: 基因着色策略。`orientation` 更适合观察方向一致性与倒位，`orthogroup` 更适合强调同源组别和配对关系。
params.description_en: Gene coloring strategy. `orientation` is more useful for inspecting strand consistency and inversions, while `orthogroup` is better for highlighting orthologous grouping and pairing relationships.

params.label: 连线样式
params.description: 共线性连接的绘制方式。`curve` 更平滑、通常更适合展示；`line` 更直接，适合在结构较简单时强调对应关系。
params.description_en: How syntenic connections are drawn. `curve` is smoother and usually better for presentation, while `line` is more direct and can be useful when the structure is simple and explicit correspondence is preferred.

params.label: 画布尺寸
params.description: 手动指定画布尺寸，例如 `10x5`。适合在轨道数量较多或准备论文排版时精调图件比例；留空则使用默认或自动优化尺寸。
params.description_en: Manually set the figure size, for example `10x5`. This is useful when many tracks are present or when fine-tuning figure proportions for publication; leave empty to use the default or auto-optimized size.

params.label: 分辨率
params.description: 栅格图的输出分辨率。更高的 DPI 更适合汇报或发表，但也会增加文件体积与导出时间。
params.description_en: Output resolution for raster figures. Higher DPI is better for presentations and publication, but also increases file size and export time.

params.label: 出图自动优化 (GenomeLens)
params.description:
启用 GenomeLens 的出图优化策略，以获得更适合展示与发表的版式，包含：
- 自动推导共线性图尺寸
- 将跨轨道连接整理为更可读的邻接轨道链
- 自动优化全局核型图的轨道标签位置
params.description_en:
Enable GenomeLens figure optimizations for cleaner presentation and publication-oriented layouts, including:
- automatic inference of figure size
- rewriting cross-track links into more readable adjacent-track chains
- automatic label placement optimization for global karyotype tracks

params.label: 使用原生局部共线性渲染器 (GenomeLens)
params.description: 使用 GenomeLens 增强型局部共线性渲染器，更好地处理跨染色体命中、局部窗口截断与多物种局部对照。
params.description_en: Use the enhanced GenomeLens local synteny renderer for better handling of cross-chromosome hits, truncated local windows, and multi-species local comparisons.
